VAL-CLEAN-002.details: Compositor is a minimal content-agnostic pixel pump. Only font-related code is a FONT_SIZE constant and passing raw bytes to CpuBackend::new.

VAL-CLEAN-003.evidence: Core (services/core/) calls fonts::shape, font_metrics, glyph_id_for_char, glyph_advance_with_axes, glyph_h_metrics — owns shaping + metrics. Render backend (libraries/render/) uses fonts::cache::GlyphCache for rasterization + font_metrics only for init validation. Compositor has zero font function calls. No fonts::shape or harfrust in render library. Font data flows one direction: init → compositor → CpuBackend.
VAL-CLEAN-003.details: Clean boundary: core = shaping + metrics, render = rasterization + caching, compositor = zero font knowledge. No duplication across boundaries.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. Architecture cleanup is verified: layout helpers in core (not scene), compositor minimal at 174 lines with zero font/content/SVG knowledge, font boundary clean (core=shaping+metrics, render=rasterization+caching), 1698 tests pass with build succeeding, documentation accurately reflects completed state.
